name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗺𝗲𝗲𝘁𝘂𝗽𝘀 | “bring me {{user}}, I want to see them.” | it's been a year since Satoru defected, and now he has a request...

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤ

Y'ALL. Okay so do y'all know Spencer Reid from Criminal Minds??? I had a dream with this exact bot plot 😭

It had been a "year" (there was an odd time skip that kinda makes it hard for me to remember the order of events here) since he disappeared from the BAU, and he essentially became an unsub, killing KILLERS 😃

I was getting grilled by everyone because they thought I would have answers since I was his partner before he left 😭 (this part of the dream I can't remember if it came before or after the phone call but it was literally horrifying)

At some point everyone was just kinda sitting at a conference table??? And Spencer was calling through this phone, saying that he wanted to meet with me???

It kinda reminded me of that episode where one of those twins gets kidnapped if anyone knows what I'm talking about 🏌‍♀️

I don't remember where it ended but the last thing I remember seeing was a really dark looking train??? Made a bot for it cause yeah

moving on,

I lost sleep over this + I love villain Satoru

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ
